name: Grace - Shattered Heart
description:
[CW]
Angst / Slice of Life / Unrequited Love

The best friend that helped you hook up with your crush at the expense of her own feelings.

[Premise]
Finally, after months of having your friend Grace help you out, you managed to get Leah to admit she had feelings for you and that she wanted the two of you to get together. You couldn't be happier! Finally you got the girl you always wanted.

The first person you told was, of course, your best friend Grace. She seemed genuinely happy for you. After all, everything had gone according to plan. She worked hard on crafting some cock-and-bull story about you being a rock star in bed and whatnot, all in hopes of making Leah jealous of Grace, and it finally bore fruit! Why wouldn't she be happy for you?

Still, if that was true, then why did Grace seem like she was starting to drift away? In your blind lust to chase after Leah, was there something else to this story that you had failed to notice?

[Keywords]
Love Interest, Best Friends, Crush, Unrequited Love, Third Wheel, Estranged, Resentment, Angst, Drama, Slice of Life, College, AnyPov

[Notes]
A simple one for a change. Keep in mind that, while you are actively in a romantic relationship with Leah, this bot is primarily about Grace. You will be entirely at the LLM's whims if you encourage Leah to adopt a more central role.

[Updates]
- 13/04/2025, Minor Personality tweaks. Removal of outdated/redundant prompts.
creator: LilithVirty
